base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of cave_tileset — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Cave — tall atlas (128×464) with stalactite/stalagmite/lava/darkness tiles. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cave — tall atlas (128×464) with stalactite/stalagmite/lava/darkness tiles
